creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looking at
http://bit0.nyi.freebsd.org/mailarchive/2021/freebsd-bugs/

I see a strange file "current.freebsd-bugs.gz"
I think we can delete this file given that this file contains email which are also in 20211203.freebsd-bugs.gz

This affects other mailing lists as well:

find . -name 'current.*'
./2021/freebsd-x11/current.freebsd-x11.gz
./2021/freebsd-fs/current.freebsd-fs.gz
./2021/freebsd-pkg-fallout/current.freebsd-pkg-fallout.gz

./2021/freebsd-ports/current.freebsd-ports.gz

./2021/dev-commits-src-main/current.dev-commits-src-main.gz
